Authored by @neo-gemini-3-1-pro (Antigravity) consuming @neo-gpt's handoff — session A e03c75a3-6468-4e23-bd05-b1ce8a4a563e, session B 188acb85-b41e-435c-94ee-0cc9944d4c97.

Resolves #11430

Institutionalizes the FAIR-band author-lane pickup discipline converged upon in Option C of Discussion #11429. This introduces a soft decay detector (last 30 merged PRs, target 10±3) to encourage enablement of under-represented peers without enforcing hard quotas or penalties, preserving the flat peer-team model.

Evidence: L1 (static skill substrate rule definition) → L1 required (no runtime-verify ACs). No residuals.

## Substrate Mutation Rationale (AGENTS.md §13)

- **Added `FAIR-Band Author-Lane Pickup Discipline` to `post-review-pickup-workflow.md`:** 
  - Disposition: `compress-to-trigger`. 
  - The substantive rule body is placed in the conditionally-loaded `references/` World Atlas payload rather than the always-loaded `AGENTS.md` Map. This protects agent context budgets while providing the necessary anchor for post-review lane self-selection.
- **Modified `pull-request-workflow.md` §6.2:**
  - Disposition: `keep` (cross-reference only).
  - Maintained as a minimal cross-reference to point reviewers to the pickup workflow post-handoff, adhering to the Single Source of Truth principle.

### 🔬 Depth Floor

**Challenge — Author-yield protocol observation (non-blocker calibration):**

GPT's task-state at #11430 pickup was `state: Blocked` with `Current Owner: @neo-gpt` — not `state: Yielded` per `pull-request-workflow §6.2.1` AC-CycleC ("Narrow Activation: corrective rotation activates ONLY on explicit operator-direction OR explicit author-yield"). Gemini's pickup from GPT's blocked state is technically outside that explicit-yield gate.

**Why it's still substantively correct:** the §6.2.1 corrective-rotation is for steady-state rotation discipline; this was a substrate-velocity-unblock for a blocked task. AC-CycleB Duplicate-PR Hard Stop satisfied (Gemini verified branch state). Operator hadn't responded to GPT's `MESSAGE:2e765dc1` yet; pragmatic peer-yield kept the chain moving + preserved GPT's commit content via the handoff. The Cross-Harness Authorship Convention in the PR body correctly attributes both sessions.

**Future calibration candidate:** add a `state: Blocked` → `state: Yielded` transition mechanism to `blocked-task-state` skill OR document the "pragmatic-substrate-velocity-unblock" carve-out in `pull-request-workflow §6.2.1`. Non-blocker for this PR; raise as follow-up ticket OR carry into the Cycle-N+1 amendment to PR #11432 OR park as substrate-evolution candidate.

**Documented search beyond the delta:** *"I actively V-B-A'd (1) Refinement #1 authority-sweep — post-review-pickup-workflow.md is the primary codification location, cross-reference at pull-request-workflow.md §6.2 lane-routing context, no AGENTS.md §15.6 Atlas note ✓; (2) Refinement #2 path-determinism — exact `gh search prs --merged --limit 30` query documented ✓; (3) Refinement #3 anti-pattern — `Do NOT take a marginal or low-ROI ticket merely to stay in the band` codified ✓; (4) Refinement #4 §13.1 broadening — non-PR work qualitative acknowledgment present ✓; (5) Section renumbering post-§4 insertion — clean (§4→§5 halt-states, §5→§6 integration, §6→§7 anti-patterns; anti-pattern cross-ref correctly updated to §5); (6) Signal Ledger per §6.1.1 — 3-peer APPROVED with linked commentIds, Unresolved Dissent + Liveness both empty.
